mission.title: grpc: LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem
mission.description: LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem. This issue affects 13+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?
```
gem info --local grpc

*** LOCAL GEMS ***

grpc (1.35.0)
    Platform: universal-darwin
    Author: gRPC Authors
    Homepage: https://github.com/google/grpc/tree/master/src/ruby

steps.title: Apply the fix for LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem
steps.description:
Kicked off an artifact run in: https://fusion2.corp.google.com/invocations/0e763400-0be8-47b6-b4ff-12b2434d989e/targets
```yaml
gem info --local grpc

*** LOCAL GEMS ***

grpc (1.35.0)
    Platform: universal-darwin
    Author: gRPC Authors
    Homepage: https://github.com/google/grpc/tree/master/src/ruby
    License: Apache-2.0
    Installed at: /Users/<me>/.rbenv/versions/3.0.0/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0

    GRPC system in Ruby
```

steps.title: Confirm LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Kicked off an artifact run in: https://fusion2.corp.google.com/invocations/0e763400-0be8-47b6-b4ff-12b2434d989e/targets
codeSnippets:
gem info --local grpc

*** LOCAL GEMS ***

grpc (1.35.0)
    Platform: universal-darwin
    Author: gRPC Authors
    Homepage: https://github.com/google/grpc/tree/master/src/ruby
    License: Apache-2.0
    Installed at: /Users/<me>/.rbenv/versions/3.0.0/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0

    GRPC system in Ruby

ᐅ rbenv install 3.0.0
